title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
